description_long: This chair features a striking, modern design with a circular, open-back form and three distinct color variations: light gray, dark gray, and brown. The seat and backrest are seamlessly integrated into a single, curved shell that envelops the user, providing both comfort and visual interest. The chair is supported by slender, black metal legs that splay outward, giving it a lightweight and airy appearance. The upholstery appears to be a mix of smooth and textured materials, with subtle stitching details visible along the edges. The backrest is high and curves around the sides, offering ample support without traditional armrests. This chair would be a stylish addition to urban parks, plazas, or modern public seating areas.
description: A modern, circular chair with a curved open-back shell, available in light gray, dark gray, and brown, supported by slender black metal legs.
description_view_0: Side view highlighting the chair's deep, enveloping curve and the contrast between the light gray and dark gray upholstery.
description_view_1: Front view showing all three color variations and the open, circular seat design with no armrests.
description_view_2: Angled view emphasizing the brown textured upholstery and the chair's sculptural, open-back form.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the high, rounded backrest and the three-legged black metal base.
